caption: A woman with dark hair styled in twists and wearing a dark green t-shirt is speaking during a podcast recording. She sits behind a black table equipped with a professional microphone on a stand. Behind her is a dark backdrop featuring white and red text and graphics, including the phrases "BOSS TALK 101", "It's A Unique Hustle", and "About It!". A logo reading "BOSS TALK 101" is also visible in the lower corners of the scene. To the left, a framed picture of hands is mounted on a white wall. As she speaks, the woman uses active hand gestures, moving her arms and hands to emphasize her points. Between the frames, her facial expressions shift slightly and her hands move through the air, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
